name: Main Jobs
description: Search-led job listings. The top bar is the `navigation-bar/search` variant (input fills the row), followed by a `tabs/underline` set ('Jobs' / 'Saved Jobs' with inline counts), a filter chip row, and a vertical `list/image` of job rows. A bookmark toggle is the only per-row commit; a transient `toast` confirms the action above the TabBar.

props.placeholder: Search by job title or company

top.note: search variant — leading back chevron (intrinsic), input fills the row, trailing profile icon. Clear icon appears only when value is non-empty.

tabs.note: Counts inline in the label, not as a trailing badge.

filters.note: Filter chip row, horizontally scrollable. Chips with chevron open a sheet/menu on tap (no inline disclosure). A leading filter icon (`button/icon`) sits before the row.

body.note: The whole card is the click target — the trailing bookmark `button/icon` is a secondary commit. Filled glyph = saved, outlined = not saved.

overlay.note: Auto-dismissing toast above the TabBar with a safe gap; triggered by tapping a row's bookmark icon. Toast is non-modal — no paired trigger pairing required, but the bookmark row is the origin.

rules: List rows are the click target; the trailing bookmark icon must not steal hit area — it is a secondary commit on top of the row tap.
Toast sits above the TabBar with a safe gap; never overlap tab labels.
Filter chips with a chevron open a sheet/menu, not inline expansion.
